zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I於1296年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。她和Richard Whethill I至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I于1296年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾。她和Richard Whethill I至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Whetehill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire, Bute, and Lanarkshire) and English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of various minor places called Whitehill, in Scotland, northern England, and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I was born in 1296, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Richard Whethill I. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I est née en 1296, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard Whethill I. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I wurde 1296 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard Whethill I mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I è nata il nel 1296 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard Whethill I. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Whethill, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill Iは1296年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はRichard Whethill Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I(은)는 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard Whethill I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I nasceu em 1296, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard Whethill I. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I родилась в 1296 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard Whethill I. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Whetehill I nació en 1296, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard Whethill I. Murió en su pueblo.
